source_idiom: للنجاح ألف أب وللهزيمة طفل يتيم
source_meaning: Everyone wants to claim responsibility for success but no one for failure.

source_idiom: ما هكذا يا سعد تورد الإبل
source_meaning: This is not the right way to do it; this is not how things should be done.

target_meaning: one's heart in one's mouth (very scared)

source_meaning: to come back empty-handed (to achieve nothing)
target_meaning: to draw a blank (fail; not to find anything; produce no successful response)
